Tests bitwise AND assignment operation with custom object methods.

# Purpose
This code defines an object with custom `valueOf` and `toString` methods, which return the values `1` and `0`, respectively. The object is then assigned to a variable `copyObject`, creating a reference to the same object. The code performs a bitwise AND operation on `object` with the value `1`, and uses an `assert` statement to verify that the result of this operation is equal to the result of a bitwise AND operation on `copyObject` with `1`, and that `object` is equal to this result. This code provides narrow functionality, primarily demonstrating the behavior of custom object methods and bitwise operations in JavaScript.
